creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Farley from comment #2)
> On a side note, I am unable to get any sounds using ALSA with my tweaked
> asound.conf or the default one.  I have to stick with OSS.

This is an indication to keep the OSS option for the time being (even if
your ALSA problems have been resolved in the meantime).
